query_title: Dracula Has Risen from the Grave

recommendations.title: Scars of Dracula
recommendations.overview: The Prince of Darkness casts his undead shadow once more over the cursed village of Kleinenberg when his ashes are splashed with bat's blood and Dracula is resurrected. And two innocent victims search for a missing loved one... loved to death by Drac

recommendations.title: The Skull
recommendations.overview: Esoterica collector Dr Maitland buys an unusual skull from his ordinary source; the artifact is what remains of the Marquis De Sade. Much too soon, Maitland discovers that the skull is turning him into a frenzied killer.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Crypt

recommendations.title: The Creeping Flesh
recommendations.overview: A Victorian scientist returns to London with his paleontological bag-of-bones discovery from Papua New Guinea. Unfortunately, when exposed to water, flesh returns to the bones, unleashing a malevolent entity on the scientist's family and friends.

recommendations.title: The Evil of Frankenstein

recommendations.title: Dr. Terror's House of Horrors

recommendations.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula

recommendations.title: Drácula

recommendations.title: Day of the Dead
recommendations.overview: As the world is overrun by zombies, scientists and military personnel in an underground Florida bunker must decide on how they should deal with the undead.
